description:
You are a stock price prediction model. Given historical data of stock opening prices for the past 49 days <extracted_history>, please forecast the opening prices for the next 15 days.

Requirements:
1. Output format: Strict Python list format containing 15 floating-point numbers, e.g., [7.23, 7.25, 7.19, ...]
2. Value range: Predicted values should be in the same order of magnitude as the historical data, with reasonable variation
3. Output only the prediction list directly, without any explanations or additional text.
<extracted_history>: {extracted_history}
